category_sources: source_facts.description says ydiff views colored diff with side-by-side and auto pager support; official GitHub README describes a terminal-based colored incremental diff viewer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses 'Ydiff'; source_facts.name is ydiff.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, configuration, themes, and known issues.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; official README installation instructions use the same ymattw/ydiff source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify colored incremental diffs, side-by-side/unified modes, terminal UI, Python, and CLI use.
